custom/nyxus.tooltip-format: NYXUS · Sierengowski Hyprland · Arch Linux · 2026 Click to open the NYXUS Start menu

clock.tooltip-format: NYXUS · {0:%A} {0:%B %d, %Y · %H:%M:%S %Z} Click to open Quick Settings
clock.on-click: sh -c 'pgrep -f nyxus_quicksettings >/dev/null && pkill -f nyxus_quicksettings || setsid python3 ~/.nyxus/nyxus_quicksettings.py >/tmp/nyxus-qs.log 2>&1 < /dev/null &'

custom/heartbeat.tooltip-format: NYXUS · System Heartbeat Live system indicator — pulses while the session is active

custom/nyx-monogram.tooltip-format: NYXUS by Sierengowski · Hyprland · Arch Linux · 2026

custom/nyxus-start.tooltip-format: NYXUS · Start Open the application launcher Find apps · Recent files · Power

custom/nyxus-panel.tooltip-format: NYXUS · Panel System control panel Quick toggles · Notifications · Profile

custom/rail-pulse.tooltip-format: NYXUS · RAIL Right-bar instrument rail — live Status · Quick · Apps

custom/app-godsapp.tooltip-format: NYXUS · GodsApp Configuration Hub Click to open

custom/app-studio.tooltip-format: NYXUS · Studio Creative Suite — Paint · Vector · 3D · Video Click to open

custom/app-sage.tooltip-format: NYXUS · SAGE Local AI Assistant Click to open

custom/app-shield.tooltip-format: NYXUS · Shield Security Center · Firewall · Audit Click to open

custom/app-control.on-click: sh -c 'if hyprctl clients -j | grep -q "io.nyxus.control"; then hyprctl dispatch focuswindow class:io.nyxus.control; else setsid python3 /home/nyx/.nyxus/nyxus_control.py >/tmp/nyxus-control.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & fi'
custom/app-control.tooltip-format: NYXUS · Control Hardware Control Center · Display · Audio · Network Click to open

custom/app-sysmon.on-click: sh -c 'if hyprctl clients -j | grep -q "io.nyxus.sysmon"; then hyprctl dispatch focuswindow class:io.nyxus.sysmon; else setsid python3 /home/nyx/.nyxus/nyxus_sysmon_gtk.py >/tmp/nyxus-sysmon.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & fi'
custom/app-sysmon.tooltip-format: NYXUS · SysMon System Monitor · CPU · RAM · Disk · Net Click to open

custom/app-stickies.on-click: sh -c 'if hyprctl clients -j | grep -q "io.nyxus.stickies"; then hyprctl dispatch focuswindow class:io.nyxus.stickies; else setsid python3 /home/nyx/.nyxus/nyxus_stickies.py >/tmp/nyxus-stickies.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & fi'
custom/app-stickies.tooltip-format: NYXUS · Stickies Sticky Notes · auto-saved Click to open

custom/app-weather.tooltip-format: NYXUS · Weather Forecast · 7 day · radar Click to open

custom/app-notes.on-click: sh -c 'if hyprctl clients -j | grep -q "org.nyxus.notes"; then hyprctl dispatch focuswindow class:org.nyxus.notes; else setsid /usr/local/bin/nyxus-notes >/tmp/nyxus-notes.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & fi'
custom/app-notes.tooltip-format: NYXUS · Notes Plain text · auto-saved Click to open

custom/app-terminal.on-click: sh -c 'if hyprctl clients -j | grep -q "io.nyxus.terminal"; then hyprctl dispatch focuswindow class:io.nyxus.terminal; else setsid python3 /home/nyx/.nyxus/nyxus_terminal.py >/tmp/nyxus-terminal.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & fi'
